Comment rules: If upgrading is not possible, wrap the checkbox creation code in a conditional compilation block or comment it out.
Table rules: When working with repeating‑section controls, locate the inner Table node before manipulating rows.
Range rules: Disambiguate the Aspose.Words.Range type by casting to Aspose.Words.Range (or using an alias) to avoid conflict with System.Range.
Saving/Export rules: When saving as a .doc file, specify SaveFormat.Doc.
